code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output: a single rating 1-5 (e.g. "Rating: 3" or just "3")
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or anger
    - Product is defective, unsafe, completely ineffective, or returned
    - Clear statements such as "terrible," "junk," "don't buy," "returned," "doesn't work"
    - Safety hazards or total failure automatically lean toward 1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - More negative than positive
    - Significant flaws, poor quality, missing parts, misleading description
    - Some limited usefulness but strong disappointment
    - Product fails after short period or underperforms vs alternatives
    - Language such as "cheap," "useless," "not as pictured," "pain to use"

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Balanced pros and cons
    - "It's okay," "average," "not great but not terrible"
    - Works but with noticeable limitations
    - Conflicted or moderate tone
    - Brief factual complaints without strong emotion (e.g., "Didn't work. Had to send it back.")
    - If sentiment is clearly mixed and neither side dominates, choose 3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Mostly positive with minor criticisms
    - Product works well but not perfect; positive but not enthusiastic
    - Phrases like "pretty good," "above average," "would recommend"
    - Minor complaints that are noticeable but do not override satisfaction
    - If review mentions any functional limitation or drawback → 4
    - Price praised despite limitations → 4 if tone is positive but not exceptional

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Strong satisfaction and enthusiasm
    - Clear recommendation to others
    - Exceeds expectations or meets high expectations with no significant flaws
    - Very positive overall tone, even if lacking extreme adjectives
    - Phrases like "love it," "perfect," "excellent," "extremely happy," "worth every penny"
    - If review expresses clear recommendation and strong satisfaction despite trivial, non-core flaws → 5
    - Overall excellence with only nitpicky criticisms → 5

    EDGE CASE HANDLING:
    - Mixed sentiment: Weigh overall conclusion more heavily than isolated complaints.
    - Updates: If a review ends negatively after an update, prioritize the final evaluation.
    - Sarcasm: Detect implicit negativity even if positive words are used ironically.
    - Comparison phrasing: If the reviewer says they would not buy again → likely 1 or 2.
    - "Better than nothing" → usually 3.
    - Minor inconvenience but strong satisfaction → 4.
    - If product is praised as "good" or "useful" without strong enthusiasm → 4.
    - Brief reviews with neutral-negative facts but no emotional language → 3.
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: It's not a good vacuum. It's hard to pick up dirt and then it will spit it out so you have to go over and over the same area. I wouldn't buy it again.
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: Very poor quality. Cheap fabric, not as pictured and the color was off. Returned the next day.
Rating: 1

Example 3:
Review: Since buying this product and it dying 12 months later I've owned numerous carpet cleaners including the Bissel Proheat 2X Pet Lift Off and the at-home version of the Rug Doctor. Both of these blew the performance of this machine out of the water. This machine would freshen up the carpets but never ...
Rating: 2

Example 4:
Review: This was pretty straightforward to put together, feels very sturdy, leaves lots of room underneath for storage (plus a little space I left open because the dog seems to be happy about being able to curl up under there and use it as a hiding place), a...
Rating: 2

Example 5:
Review: Didn't work. Had to send it back.
Rating: 3

Example 6:
Review: These are really nice IF you only use them for bigger items. They are too thick and bulky for smaller items.
Rating: 3

Example 7:
Review: I love the collapsible polyester storage basked by DII. I have several and I find them great for storing items and for moving items from room to room. Also make great little holders for toys or laundry. The pattern is attractive and I can put a lot of items in a medium sized basket. They stand up we...
Rating: 4

Example 8:
Review: They're okay, but not extraordinary. They seem to be well made and are holding up so far with no problems, and the fact that you can toss them into the washing machine to be cleaned is nice. They're just a bit on the thin side as well, though, so you wouldn't want these to be your first choice for a heavy-duty task.
Rating: 4

Example 9:
Review: Sturdy and attractive, I've had this for almost a year and it looks like new. To use you stuff bags in the top.  I've found that it can sometimes be a problem to pull them out.  But that's because we manage to accumulate a lot of grocery bags --which I use when I walk the dogs, if you know what I m...
Rating: 5

Example 10:
Review: Very nice set of skillets - and what a lovely color. Quite a bargain, and I was glad to find it as I provide my husband his "own" skillets. He tends to be a "high heat" cook, and so I don't let him use my expensive skillets. Was nice to find Farbe...
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

  Rating 4: 2 example(s)
  Rating 5: 2 example(s)

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (41 total misclassified):

  gold 2 -> 3: 1

  gold 2 -> 1: 1

Ideally you'll get this unpacked in the AM, as it does take a moment..." (gold=5, pred=4, workers=[4, 5, 4], disagreement=0.17)
    - Example: "My wife and I recently got talked into a camping weekend, and as neither of us has camped in decades, we wanted to do so in a bit of luxury.  I'm a rather large dude, and I've laid on enough beds that lost all of their air to know I wanted a good bed..." (gold=5, pred=4, workers=[4, 5, 4], disagreement=0.17)
  Pair gold=4 vs pred=5: 8 errors
    - Example: "There are two kinds of DII fabric storage bins - the ones that are reinforced and the ones that aren't. The ones that aren't tend to flop around and tip over. The ones that are reinforced are so much better. This one is the better style that actually..." (gold=4, pred=5, workers=[5, 4, 5], disagreement=0.17)
    - Example: "This is exactly what I have been looking for to use on my outdoor dining set. The design is beautiful. The tablecloth itself is made of good quality fabric. I like that spills wipe up so easily. I really like that there's a place for the umbrella pol..." (gold=4, pred=5, workers=[5, 5, 4], disagreement=0.17)
  Pair gold=2 vs pred=3: 1 errors
    - Example: "This was pretty straightforward to put together, feels very sturdy, leaves lots of room underneath for storage (plus a little space I left open because the dog seems to be happy about being able to curl up under there and use it as a hiding place), a..." (gold=2, pred=3, workers=[2, 3, 3], disagreement=0.17)

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "There are two kinds of DII fabric storage bins - the ones that are reinforced and the ones that aren't. The ones that aren't tend to flop around and tip over. The ones that are reinforced are so much better. This one is the better style that actually..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "This was pretty straightforward to put together, feels very sturdy, leaves lots of room underneath for storage (plus a little space I left open because the dog seems to be happy about being able to curl up under there and use it as a hiding place), a..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [2, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "After a couple days a giant (though compact by queen sized bed standards) box arrived, and while I anticipated the weight (I've had a few of these shipped to me), it's still heavy.  Ideally you'll get this unpacked in the AM, as it does take a moment..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "My wife and I recently got talked into a camping weekend, and as neither of us has camped in decades, we wanted to do so in a bit of luxury.  I'm a rather large dude, and I've laid on enough beds that lost all of their air to know I wanted a good bed..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This is exactly what I have been looking for to use on my outdoor dining set. The design is beautiful. The tablecloth itself is made of good quality fabric. I like that spills wipe up so easily. I really like that there's a place for the umbrella pol..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "Give Thanks Plaid is such a pretty fall pattern. The colors look great together and it can even be used going into the Christmas season if you're pairing it with rustic, country holiday decor. This tablecloth looks AMAZING with red or green plates, b..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "This table runner gets 5 Stars from me as it's better than I expected.

There are two basic pieces of fabric.  One is the backing, which is a solid blue; and the other is the front, decorative in a flag motief.  The blue backing is sturdy and gives t..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Didn't work. Had to send it back."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 3, 1] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "I am a fan of the DII everyday kitchen basics. The oval terry potholders are an essential item in the kitchen. When you are cooking, you will at some point need to pick a pan out of the oven or a pot off the stove and they can both burn you if you do..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "Really enjoy these small pans for my toaster oven."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 41 errors, 11 borderline out of 80 examples."}
